description: A configuration design engineer at an aircraft OEM needs to integrate a pair of engine nacelles into the eCRM-001 master model. Read the engine integration specification document located at ~/Desktop/nacelle_integration_spec.txt. Then, open the base model located at ~/Documents/OpenVSP/eCRM-001_wing_tail.vsp3 in OpenVSP. Add a new Pod component for the nacelle, set its dimensions and XYZ position according to the specification document, and enable XZ planar symmetry to automatically generate the port-side engine. Once correctly configured and positioned under the wing, save the updated model to ~/Documents/OpenVSP/eCRM-001_with_nacelles.vsp3.
